commentText: @Daniel Carter - Haha, honestly the only thing I’ve really used it for so far — besides short tests for my posts — is creating personalized bedtime stories for my kids 😄And I have to say… it’s amazing at that. Way more creative than me at 8pm when I’m running out of ideas!
